heroTitle: Read long documents more easily. Understand faster. Remember longer.
heroSubtitle: NexaRead turns PDFs, textbooks, and technical documents into a clean reading experience with navigation, notes, search, and source-grounded AI.
badge: A grounded reading and knowledge workspace

preview.label: NexaRead reader product preview
preview.paragraphBefore: A useful question-answering system does more than produce fluent text. It must
preview.highlight: preserve a clear link between each claim and its source evidence
preview.paragraphAfter: so readers can verify the conclusion themselves.
preview.quote: Retrieval quality sets the upper bound for a grounded answer.
preview.answer: The system prioritizes relevant passages, then answers only when evidence clears the configured confidence threshold.

problem.title: Important documents should not be hard to read or verify.
problem.description: Long files are often designed for print, not for learning and retrieval across screens.

longPdf.title: Long PDFs are tiring
longPdf.description: Scrolling through hundreds of pages makes you lose position, context, and reading rhythm.

brokenLayout.title: Layouts break easily
brokenLayout.description: Columns, headings, and spacing become difficult to follow on smaller laptops and phones.

lostKnowledge.title: Key ideas get lost
lostKnowledge.description: Disconnected highlights and notes make recently read knowledge disappear quickly.

ungroundedAi.title: AI can lack evidence
ungroundedAi.description: A confident answer is still unhelpful when you cannot return to the exact source passage.

how.title: From a raw document to a structured reading experience.
how.description: NexaRead preserves the original, creates a clean reading layer, and connects AI answers to evidence.

upload.title: Upload your document
upload.description: Add a PDF, DOCX, EPUB, or public article URL to your private library.

structure.title: NexaRead structures the layout
structure.description: Headings, paragraphs, contents, and reading order are rebuilt while source anchors remain intact.

learn.title: Read, annotate, and ask AI
learn.description: Search, highlight, save notes, and open the exact citations behind each answer.

features.title: Enough tools to understand, without the noise.
features.description: Every capability serves one purpose: preserve reading flow, capture thinking, and verify the source.

book.title: A book-like reader
book.description: One- or two-page layouts, contents, and progress measured against real rendered space.

layout.title: Clean document layout
layout.description: Source and display text remain separate so presentation can improve without losing provenance.

citations.title: AI with citations
citations.description: Answers link to the page, section, and passage used as supporting evidence.

private.title: A private library
private.description: The API verifies account ownership before reading, searching, downloading, or asking AI.

notes.title: Highlights and notes
notes.description: Mark important ideas, add notes, and return to the exact content block.

devices.title: Continue across devices
devices.description: Reading progress and preferences are account-backed so you resume in the right place.

audience.title: Long knowledge, real work, limited time.
audience.description: NexaRead is for people who need to understand and return to documents often.

privacy.title: Privacy enforced in the product.
privacy.description: We only describe controls that exist in the system: authentication, ownership checks, and source traceability.

account.title: Secure sign-in sessions
account.description: Sessions use HttpOnly cookies and can be reviewed or revoked from the account.

ownership.title: Per-user data isolation
ownership.description: Documents, collections, annotations, search, and RAG are all filtered by owner.

original.title: The original stays verifiable
original.description: Original files are served through a private endpoint after account verification.

citations.title: Stable source anchors
citations.description: The display layer never replaces source text used by search, evidence, or citations.

faq.title: What to know before you begin.
faq.description: These answers reflect NexaRead's current implemented capabilities.

formats.question: Which file types does NexaRead support?
formats.answer: You can upload PDF, DOCX, and EPUB files or import one public HTTP/HTTPS article URL. The upload wizard displays the configured size limit.

privacy.question: Are my documents private?
privacy.answer: Yes. Reading, search, annotations, download, and AI flows require a signed-in session and verify document ownership.

hallucination.question: Can the AI make things up?
hallucination.answer: Every model can be wrong. NexaRead reduces risk with evidence thresholds, not-enough-information behavior, and backend-validated citations so you can verify the source.

scan.question: Can NexaRead read scanned files?
scan.answer: OCR is not supported yet. Image-only PDFs are marked OCR_REQUIRED, keep their original file, and include guidance for creating a text-layer PDF.

vietnamese.question: Does it support Vietnamese?
vietnamese.answer: Yes. The interface is Vietnamese-first, and the pipeline includes language detection, paragraph reconstruction, and heading rules for Vietnamese content.

original.question: Can I view the original file?
original.answer: Yes. The original remains available from a private endpoint after ownership is verified.

finalCta.title: Turn your next document into a book that is easier to read.
finalCta.description: Build your private library, keep sources within reach, and spend more time understanding.
